creator: bsd-unix@embarqmail.com
text:
It seems that
/usr/local/lib/linux-netscape-navigator/defaults/pref/brower-prefs.js
doesn't get installed.  It doesn't appear to be in the tarball
either so I'm guessing that the pkg-plist should not have

  lib/%%APP_NAME%%/defaults/pref/browser-prefs.js

included since a package build fails and it complains about it
missing when deinstalling.  Perhaps it was inadvertently omitted
from the tarball?

Randy
--
